mapper.select:
select STCD,SUM(DRP) DRP from ST_PPTN_R
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{stcd}
group by STCD order by DRP desc

select * from ST_PPTN_R
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{stcd}
order by TM desc

select STCD,DATE_FORMAT(TM,'%Y-%m-%d') as TM,SUM(DRP) as DRP from ST_PPTN_R
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{stcd}
group by STCD,DATE_FORMAT(TM,'%Y-%m-%d')

select STCD,MAX(DRP) as DRP from ( select STCD,DATE_FORMAT(TM,'%Y-%m-%d %H') as TM,SUM(DRP) as DRP from ST_PPTN_R
and TM > to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{stcd}
group by STCD,DATE_FORMAT(TM,'%Y-%m-%d %H') ) as PPTN group by STCD order by DRP desc

select STCD,TM,DRP from ST_PPTN_R
and TM >=to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{stcd}

select STCD,TM,DRP from ST_PPTN_R
and TM > to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{stcd}
and drp > 0
and mtype=#{mtype}

select STCD,DATE_FORMAT(TM,'%Y-%m-%d %H') as TM,SUM(DRP) as DRP from ST_PPTN_R
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{stcd}
group by STCD,DATE_FORMAT(TM,'%Y-%m-%d %H')

select STCD,DATE_FORMAT(DATEADD(MINUTE, -5 , TM),'%Y-%m-%d %H') as TM,SUM(DRP) as DRP from ST_PPTN_R
and TM > to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{stcd}
and drp > 0
group by STCD,DATE_FORMAT(DATEADD(MINUTE, -5 , TM),'%Y-%m-%d %H') order by DRP desc

select STCD,DATE_FORMAT(DATEADD(MINUTE, -485 , TM),'%Y-%m-%d') as TM,SUM(DRP) as DRP from ST_PPTN_R
and TM > to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{stcd}
and drp > 0
group by STCD,DATE_FORMAT(DATEADD(MINUTE, -485 , TM),'%Y-%m-%d') order by DRP desc

select * from GETWATERVIEWPPTNR
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{STCD}
and MTYPE = #{MTYPE}
order by tm desc

select stcd,max(stnm)stnm,max(lgtd)lgtd,max(lttd)lttd,sum(drp) drp,max(mtype) mtype,to_char(tm,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24')||':00:00' tm from GETWATERVIEWPPTNR
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{STCD}
and MTYPE = #{MTYPE}
group by stcd ,to_char(tm,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24')

select stcd,max(stnm)stnm,max(lgtd)lgtd,max(lttd)lttd,sum(drp) drp,max(mtype) mtype,to_char(tm,'yyyy-MM-dd') tm from GETWATERVIEWPPTNR
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{STCD}
and MTYPE = #{MTYPE}
group by stcd ,to_char(tm,'yyyy-MM-dd')

select stcd,max(stnm)stnm,max(lgtd)lgtd,max(lttd)lttd,sum(drp) drp,mtype,max(lgtd84)lgtd84,max(lttd84)lttd84,max(addvnm) as addvnm,max(tm) as tm from GETWATERVIEWPPTNR
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{STCD}
and MTYPE = #{MTYPE}
group by MTYPE,stcd

select stcd,max(stnm) stnm,mtype,to_char(TM,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24')||':00:00' as TM,sum(drp) as drp from GETWATERVIEWPPTNR
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{STCD}
and MTYPE = #{MTYPE}
group by mtype,stcd,to_char(TM,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24') order by drp desc

choose.when:
SELECT STCD,TRUNC(TM - INTERVAL '8' HOUR - INTERVAL '1' MINUTE, 'DD') AS TM,SUM(DRP) AS DRP FROM GETWATERVIEWPPTNR
and STCD in
#{STCD}
and MTYPE=#{mtype}
and TM>to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM<= to_date(#{etime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY STCD, TRUNC(TM - INTERVAL '8' HOUR - INTERVAL '1' MINUTE, 'DD') ORDER BY TM

SELECT STCD , to_date(TO_CHAR(TRUNC(TM, 'HH24'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TM, SUM(DRP) AS DRP FROM GETWATERVIEWPPTNR
and MTYPE=#{mtype}
and STCD in
#{STCD}
and TM > to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM-1 <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY STCD,TRUNC(TM, 'HH24') ORDER BY TM
choose.otherwise:
select STCD,TM, DRP from GETWATERVIEWPPTNR
and STCD in
#{STCD}
and MTYPE=#{mtype}
and TM>=to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM<= to_date(#{etime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY TM

mapper.select: select * from WARNINGPPTNR

WITH StationDistance AS ( SELECT stcd, stnm, lgtd, lttd, 2 * 6371 * ASIN( SQRT( POWER(SIN((#{lttd} - lttd) * PI() / 180 / 2), 2) + COS(#{lttd} * PI() / 180) * COS(lttd * PI() / 180) * POWER(SIN((#{lgtd} - lgtd) * PI() / 180 / 2), 2) ) ) AS distance_km FROM "SZ_WATER"."ATT_QXST_BASE" WHERE lgtd IS NOT NULL AND lttd IS NOT NULL ), HourlyRainfall AS ( SELECT stcd, SUM(drp) AS drp FROM "SZ_WATER"."HRI_QXPPTN_R"
and TM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY stcd ) SELECT s.stcd, s.stnm, s.lgtd, s.lttd, s.distance_km, COALESCE(r.drp, 0) AS DRP FROM StationDistance s LEFT JOIN HourlyRainfall r ON s.stcd = r.stcd ORDER BY s.distance_km ASC

select TO_CHAR(TM - INTERVAL '1' HOUR , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TM,ROUND( AVG(DRP),1) as DRP from (
SELECT STCD, CASE WHEN DATEPART(MINUTE, TM) >= 5 THEN DATEADD(HOUR, 1, DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, TM), 0)) ELSE DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, TM), 0) END AS TM, SUM(DRP) AS DRP, COUNT(*) AS DataCount FROM ST_PPTN_R
and TM > #{stime}
and TM <=to_date( #{etime})
and STCD in
#{stcd}
GROUP BY STCD, CASE WHEN DATEPART(MINUTE, TM) >= 5 THEN DATEADD(HOUR, 1, DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, TM), 0)) ELSE DATEADD(HOUR, DATEDIFF(HOUR, 0, TM), 0) END ORDER BY STCD, TM ) as alldata GROUP BY TM order by TM

select TM,SUM(DRP) as DYP,ROUND(AVG(DRP),1) as DRP from ST_PPTN_R
and TM > to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and TM <= to_date(#{etime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and STCD in
#{stcd}
GROUP BY TM ORDER BY TM ASC
